description_long: This chaise features a modern, sculptural design crafted from what appears to be a single, continuous piece of wood with a natural finish. The seat and backrest flow seamlessly in a series of smooth, angular curves, providing ergonomic support for reclining. The base is a wide, flat platform that supports the main body with a central pedestal, giving the chaise a floating appearance. The edges are sharply defined, and there is a subtle accent of a darker or reddish hue along the underside, adding visual interest. The surface is unupholstered, showcasing the wood grain and a matte finish. This piece would serve as a striking, functional accent in urban parks, plazas, or modern public spaces.
description: A sculptural, modern wooden chaise with smooth, angular curves and a floating pedestal base, finished in natural wood tones with a subtle accent underneath.
description_view_0: From this angle, the chaise's flowing, angular seat and backrest are prominent, with the pedestal base and subtle underside accent visible.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the chaise's long, continuous curve and the way the seat transitions into the backrest, as well as the broad, stable base.
description_view_2: The rear perspective emphasizes the pedestal support and the dramatic upward sweep of the backrest, with the underside accent more visible.
description_view_3: From the opposite end, the chaise's ergonomic dip and the integration of the seat and backrest are clear, along with the wide, flat base.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is integrated into the main body, rising smoothly from the seat in a continuous, angular curve. It is moderately high, with no segmentation or decorative elements, and features a sharp, geometric profile.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present; the sides are open and unadorned.
attribute_leg_style: The chaise is supported by a wide, flat pedestal base that extends the length of the piece, with a central support column. The base is made of the same wood as the rest of the chaise and has a minimalist, geometric design.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: There is no visible upholstery; the surface is solid wood with a natural grain pattern and a matte finish.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: No cushions are present; the seating surface is a continuous, unpadded wooden form.
